text:
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Daily correspondence summary indicating urgent attention needed for a Zamzar billing issue.
- [escalation] Zamzar Limited: Payment processing failure notice from Zamzar requesting updated payment details.
- [reply needed] Andy: Personal email from brother Andrew Lang reflecting on trying to change or fix people.
- [reply needed] Zamzar: Zamzar billing notification that recent payment failed and payment details need updating.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch provides instructions on how to make graphics appear properly from a Word document, referencing 4-5 elements.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch shares WayBack snapshots in a Word doc and asks if missing website sections can be recovered.
- [scheduling] Peter Nordlund: Invitation to June 19 Scriptural Reasoning event with request to confirm attendance and bring fruit.
- [scheduling] Sarah Moyer: Sarah Moyer updates arrival time to approximately 12:30 due to missing the 10:30 ferry, declines food offer.
- [follow up] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch responding in thread about recovering Wayback Machine copies of a website, suggesting posting a flat file version.
- [no action] "Superhuman – Zain Kahn": Superhuman newsletter about ChatGPT updates and features.
